# opslevel_team_property_definition (Resource)

Team Property Definition Resource



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `alias` (String) The human-friendly, unique identifier of the team property definition.
- `name` (String) The display name of the team property definition.
- `schema` (String) The schema of the team property definition.

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the team property definition.
- `locked_status` (String) Restricts what sources are able to assign values to this property. One of `ui_locked`, `unlocked`

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
